_comment: Sort-intent false-positive/true-positive eval battery. These cases exercise LLM ADHERENCE to the SORT INTENT prompt block in src/Http/AiEndpointHandler.php::appendSortableFieldsInstruction(). They CANNOT be asserted by a deterministic unit test (no live model in CI); they are re-run by hand or by the browser regression eval against a demo by POSTing each query to /…/expand-query with the listed sortableFields and comparing the returned sort_hint to expectSort. expectSort null means no sort key should be returned. Keep in sync with the prompt examples; add new false positives here when found in regression.

items.query: I am looking for a gift for my friend who likes the cheapest handmade items
a present for someone who loves the most expensive crystals
I want a necklace that uses the most expensive gemstones
show me ideas for a friend who enjoys reading the newest tarot guides
